---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a change or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## What problem does this solve?

<!-- Describe the concrete problem, not the solution. What workflow breaks? What's impossible that should be possible? -->

## Which DEAR phase does this touch?

- [ ] Define — improving specs, prompts, or acceptance criteria
- [ ] Enforce — adding synchronous checks or gates
- [ ] Audit — improving async detection or the event log
- [ ] Resolve & Refine — improving self-healing or the feedback loop
- [ ] Infrastructure — session management, CLI, storage, adapters

## Proposed approach

<!-- Optional: if you have a specific design in mind, describe it here. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you think about? Why did you rule it out? -->
